case_title: JANET C RANDRUP VS. CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF RANDRUP, JANET C ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-05-2013 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO DEC-09-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS AT TODAYS HEARING. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANGIE CHOW--DISTRICT CLAIMS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-09-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-09-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY ANGIE CHAU--DISTRICT CLAIMS OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-09-2013 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RANDRUP, JANET C IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CALIFORNIA DEPARTMENT OF TRANSPORTATION STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
